### STRATEGIC GOAL

The Yusanavian High Command has authorized a terminal infiltration strike—code-named IRON FIST—with the goal of crippling the logistical command arteries of the Cascadian Republic. The operation aims to deliver and detonate a chemical payload in the vicinity of the Camp, located in the Emerald District of Sector 3. This is a non-recoverable asset mission. Operators will not return,
